title: L'Envoi.
content:
Oh, awful Power whose works repel
    The marvel of the earth's designs,--
    I 'll hie me otherwhere to dwell,
    Arcadia has trolley lines.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Laurence Dunbar delivers a powerful performance in "L'Envoi."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
